script.title: Tension Ko Door Karo Breathwork Se!
script.hook: Kya aapko stress har roz feel hota hai? Chaliye, isse door karne ke 2 powerful techniques jaan lete hain!
script.problem: Stress humare body aur mind dono par bura asar daalta hai. Hamari saans ka flow, posture, aur focus sab kharab ho jate hain.
script.insight: Lekin, aapki breathing technique ko sudharne se aap stress ko control kar sakte hain. Yeh baat science bhi kehata hai!
script.solution: Pehla, '4-7-8 Technique': 4 seconds tak saans lo, 7 seconds tak roko, phir 8 seconds tak chhodo. Dusra, 'Box Breathing': 4 seconds tak saans lo, 4 seconds tak ruko, 4 seconds tak chhodo, phir phir se 4 seconds inhale karo. In dono exercises se na sirf aapka stress door hoga, balki aapka posture aur core strength bhi improve hoga.
